text: if you threw a party and no one showed
up it would probably be pretty upsetting
but what if that was exactly what you
expected would that make it any better
well this happened at a party 15 years
ago and even though no one showed up
you're technically still invited in 2009
Steven Hawkin rented out a room at
Cambridge University with balloons
decorations and champagne he sat at this
party all alone for a few hours and once
he realized that no one was coming he
eventually left but it wasn't until he
had left and the party was officially
over that he actually sent out the
invitations this was Steven Hawkings
famous time travel party that was held
for future humans if we are able to ever
crack the mystery of time travel there's
nothing in our current understanding of
physics that strictly prohibits it so
step Hawkin wanted to see if people
would show up and as of right now they
haven't but what stevenh knew was that
one day if some future scientist created
an advanced theory of gravity that
allowed it they could read about his
party in the historical record and go
back and visit him
